title: Multi SSH should allow Loading Scripts
author: souman101
body_snippet: I want to request for a feature where Multi SSH should allow Loading Scripts. This will save a lot of time. Instead of typing commands on MultiSSH one by one.

iterations.description: Users want to execute scripts across multiple SSH connections, enhancing the Multi SSH functionality.

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

---

> *We sincerely appreciate the mRemoteNG maintainers and the wonderful community that has kept this project alive and thriving for over a decade. Your work powers thousands of IT professionals worldwide, including us. Our fork ...

notes:
AI triage (gemini): Users want to execute scripts across multiple SSH connections, enhancing the Multi SSH functionality.
Approach: Add a new 'MultiSshScript' string property to ConnectionInfo to store script content. Integrate UI elements in ConnectionWindow or a new dialog to allow input of this script. Implement logic to execute the stored script on all selected SSH connections during a Multi SSH session.
